query:
SELECT e.id, e.codigoInterno, e.nomeCompleto, c.nomeFantasia as empresa,
  CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(e.codigoInterno, '[^0-9]', '') AS UNSIGNED) as numPart,
  SUBSTRING(e.codigoInterno, 1, 3) as prefixo
FROM employees e 
JOIN companies c ON e.companyId = c.id
WHERE CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(e.codigoInterno, '[^0-9]', '') AS UNSIGNED) IN (13, 17, 22, 24, 69, 171, 666)
ORDER BY c.nomeFantasia, CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(e.codigoInterno, '[^0-9]', '') AS UNSIGNED);

  SUBSTRING(e.codigoInterno, 1, 3) as prefixo
FROM employees e 
JOIN companies c ON e.companyId = c.id
WHERE CAST(REGEXP_REPLACE(e.codigoInterno, '[^0-9]', '') AS UNSIGNED) IN (13, 17, 22, 24, 69, 171, 666)
